allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add requirements.txt for stable Python environment and update project documentation

- Add requirements.txt with all project dependencies \(Flask 3.1.2, Jinja2, Werkzeug, etc.\)
- Update .gitignore with comprehensive Python, IDE, and OS exclusions
- Update README.md with new installation instructions using requirements.txt
- Change environment directory from venv/ to .venv/ following Python conventions

This ensures a stable environment where Flask no longer needs manual reinstallation after activating the virtual environment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :5000 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /F /PID %a")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process python* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process pythonw* -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force")
